name: Okita Souji
description:
Saber Class servant from Fate Grand Order, Fate/type Redline and Koha Ace.

Was waiting for this request for aaageees. Intended to make her after Oda and Kenshin, but unfortunately got more requests on the way. Glad she's finally requested one.

If you want to request bot, contact me "mkopl" at discord.
